TITLE_CHAIN_GAP.closure_guidance: Obtain a complete ownership chain from the last admitted owner to the proposed mortgagor and reconcile names, plot particulars, and dates across title documents and revenue or society record.
TITLE_CHAIN_GAP.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide a complete and continuous title chain, supported by registered or authority-issued transfer documents and current ownership record, satisfactory to the Bank.

SELLER_OR_ALLOTTEE_MISMATCH.closure_guidance: Reconcile the seller or transferor name with the allottee or recorded owner and obtain authority confirmation where the transfer history is not self-evident.
SELLER_OR_ALLOTTEE_MISMATCH.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide documentary evidence reconciling the seller or transferor with the recorded allottee or owner, in form and substance satisfactory to the Bank.

required_evidence: CNIC copies of transferor and transferee
CNIC_MISMATCH.closure_guidance: Match CNIC numbers and names across the deed, application, and ownership record. Unresolved identity mismatch should remain open or move to waiver only with approver rationale.
CNIC_MISMATCH.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide documentary evidence reconciling all CNIC and identity particulars across title, transfer, and financing documents, satisfactory to the Bank.

MISSING_REGISTERED_SALE_DEED.closure_guidance: Obtain the registered conveyance or certified registry evidence before treating title as mortgageable. Photocopies without registry support are insufficient.
MISSING_REGISTERED_SALE_DEED.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide the registered sale deed or certified registry evidence for the subject property, satisfactory to the Bank.

MISSING_ALLOTMENT_OR_TRANSFER_LETTER.closure_guidance: For society plot or file-based title, obtain the allotment or transfer instrument that bridges the borrower to the society record.
MISSING_ALLOTMENT_OR_TRANSFER_LETTER.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide the allotment letter and all relevant transfer instruments linking the property to the borrower, satisfactory to the Bank.

SOCIETY_NOC_MISSING.closure_guidance: Obtain a current society NOC confirming no objection to mortgage, transfer status, and dues position before approval.
SOCIETY_NOC_MISSING.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide a current society no-objection certificate and mortgage permission, together with dues clearance, satisfactory to the Bank.

LAYOUT_APPROVAL_MISSING.closure_guidance: Confirm that the scheme, block, and plot fall within approved layout and regulatory permissions. Unresolved approval gaps should block readiness.
LAYOUT_APPROVAL_MISSING.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide evidence of competent authority approval for the scheme, block, and layout plan, satisfactory to the Bank.

DUES_POSSESSION_TRANSFER_CHARGES_ISSUE.closure_guidance: Obtain proof that dues, transfer charges, and possession formalities are cleared, or specifically quantify the unpaid liability and keep the issue open until regularized.
DUES_POSSESSION_TRANSFER_CHARGES_ISSUE.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide satisfactory evidence that dues, possession, and transfer charge formalities for the subject property have been cleared.

MUTATION_OR_FARD_INCONSISTENCY.closure_guidance: Refresh and reconcile the latest revenue record with the deed and the physical property identifiers. Outdated or inconsistent revenue record should not be treated as cured.
MUTATION_OR_FARD_INCONSISTENCY.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide current and consistent revenue record, including fard and mutation evidence, satisfactory to the Bank.

COMPETING_CHARGE_OR_NON_ENCUMBRANCE_ISSU.closure_guidance: Clear any prior mortgage, attachment, lis pendens, or adverse charge through documentary release or official negative search before closure.
COMPETING_CHARGE_OR_NON_ENCUMBRANCE_ISSU.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide satisfactory evidence that the property is free from prior charge, attachment, or adverse encumbrance.

CORPORATE_AUTHORITY_MISSING.closure_guidance: Confirm the corporate seller or mortgagor has valid internal authority to dispose of or mortgage the property and that signatories are duly empowered.
CORPORATE_AUTHORITY_MISSING.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide valid corporate authority documents, including board approval and signatory authorization, satisfactory to the Bank.

required_evidence: Court permission to sell or mortgage
GUARDIAN_MINOR_PERMISSION_TO_SELL.closure_guidance: Where a minor or represented person holds an interest, obtain the competent court or guardian authorization before treating the transfer or mortgage as valid.
GUARDIAN_MINOR_PERMISSION_TO_SELL.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide court-approved guardian authority or other competent authorization for any minor or represented interest in the property.

required_evidence: Authority to sell or mortgage clause
POWER_OF_ATTORNEY_VALIDATION_ISSUE.closure_guidance: Verify that the power of attorney is valid, subsisting, properly attested or registered where required, and expressly covers the property and transaction.
POWER_OF_ATTORNEY_VALIDATION_ISSUE.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide a valid and subsisting power of attorney, duly attested or registered where required and expressly authorizing the transaction.

AUTHORITY_APPROVAL_DEPENDENCY.closure_guidance: Obtain the relevant authority clearance for the scheme, block, or plot and confirm there is no demolition, acquisition, or regularization risk outstanding.
AUTHORITY_APPROVAL_DEPENDENCY.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide relevant authority clearance and status verification for the scheme, block, and plot, satisfactory to the Bank.

BORROWER_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.closure_guidance: The borrower or mortgagor identity must match the ownership and transaction record. Mismatches require corrected documents or satisfactory legal explanation.
BORROWER_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide documentary evidence reconciling borrower identity particulars across title, KYC, and financing records.

OUTDATED_REVENUE_EXTRACT.closure_guidance: Replace stale revenue extracts with a recent record before relying on ownership, mutation, or encumbrance status.
OUTDATED_REVENUE_EXTRACT.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide updated revenue record for the subject property, including a recent fard or equivalent land record extract.

MAP_OR_SITE_PLAN_INCONSISTENCY.closure_guidance: Reconcile the site plan, block, plot number, dimensions, and actual property identification. Mismatched plans should remain open until cured.
MAP_OR_SITE_PLAN_INCONSISTENCY.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide approved site plan and property identification evidence consistent with the title and authority record.

POSSESSION_EVIDENCE_MISSING.closure_guidance: Where possession status is relevant to credit or security perfection, obtain possession evidence or clearly document why constructive possession is acceptable.
POSSESSION_EVIDENCE_MISSING.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide satisfactory evidence of possession or handover of the mortgaged property, if applicable.

CAPACITY_OR_AUTHORITY_ISSUE.closure_guidance: Confirm the transferor or mortgagor has legal capacity and execution authority. Unresolved capacity gaps should not be closed without documentary support or approver waiver.
CAPACITY_OR_AUTHORITY_ISSUE.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide documentary evidence of legal capacity and execution authority for the transferor or mortgagor, satisfactory to the Bank.

SOCIETY_TRANSFER_MEMBERSHIP_ISSUE.closure_guidance: Confirm the member or owner record has been updated in the society books and that transfer formalities and charges stand completed.
SOCIETY_TRANSFER_MEMBERSHIP_ISSUE.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide society membership confirmation and completed transfer record for the subject property, satisfactory to the Bank.

CANTONMENT_NOC_MISSING.closure_guidance: Where the property falls in cantonment limits, obtain board clearance and confirm no transfer or construction restriction impairs enforceability.
CANTONMENT_NOC_MISSING.cp_recommended_text: Prior to approval / disbursement, the borrower shall provide the relevant Cantonment Board no-objection certificate and compliance record, satisfactory to the Bank.
